creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
It's reasonable to expect users will be updating ports via ports, if
only by a virtue of portupgrade -a. Your port should work correctly in
that case.

Also, Dean, could you take a look at ports/118923? Thanks.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>
May your arrow always find its mark.
